item.title: AI disruption could spark a âshock to the systemâ in credit markets, UBS analyst says
item.description: UBS analyst Matthew Mish told CNBC that the artificial intelligence transformation is happening faster than he and his colleagues had previously antic...

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: DraftKings, Applied Materials, Roku, Rivian Automotive and more
item.description: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in premarket trading.

item.title: China's Baidu adds OpenClaw AI into search app for 700 million users ahead of Lunar New Year
item.description: Chinese search engine operator Baidu plans Friday to start letting smartphone app users to directly tell OpenClaw AI to perform tasks.

item.title: Xiaomi's electric SUV tops China sales in January, sells twice as many as Tesla's Model Y
item.description: Chinese smartphone company Xiaomi has priced its vehicles below Tesla's and marketed features it claims are comparable or superior.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves after hours: Rivian, Applied Materials, Airbnb, Pinterest, DraftKings & more
item.description: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in extended trading.
